div.h1: TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION: IO_URING BUFFER OWNERSHIP & LIFECYCLE
div.p: Module: io_uring_buffer_pool.c | Target: x86_64 Linux 5.10+ Security Context: Kernel-space DMA Access / Memory Isolation

ul.li: Kernel Ownership: While state is SUBMITTED, the Kernel owns physical pages.
Memory Ordering: Use smp_load_acquire() on CQE arrival.
